title: [skip-ci] GHA: Closed issue/PR comment-lock test
body:
/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Lock discussions on closed PRs and Issues after 90-days of inactivity.

Ref:
     https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/19012
and
     https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19691
and
     https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19700

#### How to verify it

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

There's no easy way to test this before merging since it involves passing secret env. vars. :cry: 

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


```release-note
None
```

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [cevich] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Note to me: This new job should be manually run after this PR merges to make sure the call works (they sometimes break for non-obvious reasons).

[Ran this manually (log)](https://github.com/containers/buildah/actions/runs/5980317356).  Gee it would be nice if there was a way to test or even validate these damn github-action whatsits before merging :angry:
